# CWE-515 negative: quota stored per tenant in database (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-515-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func SetQuotaCovert(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	tenant := r.Header.Get("X-Tenant")
	over := r.FormValue("over") == "1"
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE quotas SET over_limit = ? WHERE tenant = ?", over, tenant)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProbeQuotaCovert(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	tenant := r.Header.Get("X-Tenant")
	var over bool
	_ = db.QueryRow("SELECT over_limit FROM quotas WHERE tenant = ?", tenant).Scan(&over)
	if over {
		w.Write([]byte("over_limit"))
		return
	}
	w.Write([]byte("ok"))
}
